location: Purchased for 1,000 Runes from the Nomadic Merchant camped beside the road between Mistwood Ruins and Fort Haight, in eastern Limgrave.
tactics: From the Fort Haight West grace, head north along the road to find the merchant's bonfire camp.
The Twin Maiden Husks also sell it later if you acquire this merchant's Bell Bearing.
lore: A dependable, solidly-built medium metal shield decorated with an image of the Erdtree set against a blue sky.

builds.name: Early full-block Strength
builds.why: 100% physical negation and one of the highest Guard Boost values among cheap early shields, a strong turtle-guard option for only 1,000 Runes.
